summary: Iter 195 backend audit-driven consistency fixes (#1-#6) fully validated. All 9 new tests pass + 25 regression tests (iter 192/193/194) pass. End-to-end HTTP validation through external public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL confirms reconciliation block + wallet_movements_check are present with correct schema.
critical_code_review_comments: Sales reconciliation: pre-existing data drift causes high variance for full-period queries (variance 24704 across all data). This is acknowledged by the main agent — formula correctly applies for NEW invoices (test_fix3 validates this). Suggest exposing a `since` filter or per-invoice reconciliation listing in the audit UI to help auditors pinpoint old offending invoices.

wallet_movements_check.supported=false when branch_id is omitted (returns only {supported, reason}). Other keys (starting_float, net_wallet_movements, etc.) are absent from response in that case. Frontend consumers must handle the partial schema; consider always returning null-keyed payload for schema stability.

test_consistency_195.py uses module-scoped auth fixture but per-function seed cleanup — this is correct, but be aware that parallel test runs could collide on shared DB (already mitigated via uuid4 SKUs/customer ids).

Fix #4 PO reopen relies on `reversed=True` flag; ensure all moving-average queries across the codebase consistently exclude `reversed=True` movements (audit /app/backend/routes/*.py for any other consumer of `movements` collection that computes avg cost).
seed_data_creation: Per-test ephemeral products/customers/PO records created with uuid4 SKUs and cleaned up in teardown. No persistent test data left in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 195 confirmed stable. Fix #1 (credit return AR + invoice balance reduction), Fix #2 (shelf vs pullout return profit netting), Fix #3 (sales reconciliation block), Fix #4 (PO reopen reversed flag + moving avg isolation), Fix #5 (void invoice tags discount_audit_log + price_change_log), Fix #6 (cash wallet_movements_check) — all verified via pytest AND end-to-end HTTP through public external URL. Fix #7 (org-scoping audit) and #8 (pullout movement cleanup) deferred per main agent.
